subcodes.title: Namaz-i-Hajat and instructions re ablutions
subcodes.first_line: O Pen of the Most High! Make mention of him who is immersed in the seas of doubt and passion, that perchance thou mayest purify him
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم الاعلی ذکر الذی غرق فی ابحر الظن و الهوی لعل یخلصه ما یجری عنک و
subcodes.subjects: @law of obligatory prayer, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
